events.text: You have your first real job interview. Your palms are sweaty in a small office downtown.

choices.label: Take a deep breath and smile
choices.resultText: You calmed your nerves and made a decent impression.

choices.label: Panic and stumble over answers
choices.resultText: The interview was awkward. You hope for better luck next time.

events.text: A coworker takes credit for your work during a team meeting. The room goes quiet.

choices.label: Call them out politely
choices.resultText: Your boss noted your contribution. Tension remains.

choices.label: Let it slide
choices.resultText: You swallowed your frustration. It ate at you all week.

choices.label: Confront them privately
choices.resultText: They apologised. A fragile truce was reached.

events.text: A struggling colleague asks for help on a deadline. You are already tired from your own workload.

choices.label: Slack off and ignore them
choices.resultText: You scrolled on your phone. Your manager noticed.

choices.label: Help them after hours
choices.resultText: You stayed late. The team respects you more now.

events.text: Your employer announces an unexpected performance bonus this quarter.

choices.label: Save the bonus
choices.resultText: You transferred it straight to your account. Smart move.

choices.label: Treat the family
choices.resultText: A big meal out for everyone. Worth every penny.

events.text: Your supervisor asks if you can work overtime this weekend. Extra pay is on the table.

choices.label: Accept the overtime
choices.resultText: You worked Saturday and Sunday. Exhausting but lucrative.

choices.label: Decline and rest
choices.resultText: You slept in and watched football. Your body thanked you.

events.text: A new work year begins. How are you approaching your job this year?

choices.label: Coast and do the minimum
choices.resultText: You clocked in, clocked out, and avoided extra effort.

choices.label: Keep a steady pace
choices.resultText: Reliable and consistent. Nothing flashy.

choices.label: Grind for a promotion
choices.resultText: You arrived early and left late. Management took note.

events.text: A cousin offers you a chance to invest in a matatu route. It could pay off — or flop.

choices.label: Invest heavily
choices.resultText: The route was profitable. Your phone buzzes with M-Pesa alerts.

choices.label: Invest cautiously
choices.resultText: Modest returns, but you kept most of your savings safe.

choices.label: Pass on the opportunity
choices.resultText: You heard later the route struggled. Dodged a bullet, maybe.

events.text: A friend offers you a chance to invest in a {transportMode} route. It could pay off — or flop.

choices.label: Invest heavily
choices.resultText: The route was profitable. {moneyApp} alerts kept buzzing on your phone.

choices.label: Invest cautiously
choices.resultText: Modest returns, but you kept most of your savings safe.

choices.label: Pass on the opportunity
choices.resultText: You heard later the route struggled. Dodged a bullet, maybe.

events.text: You spot a chance to run a small corner shop selling {moneyApp} credit and snacks near your neighbourhood.

choices.label: Rent the kiosk space
choices.resultText: Weekend sales boosted your income. Juggling two ventures is tiring.

choices.label: Partner with a friend
choices.resultText: You split profits but shared the workload. Fair deal.

choices.label: Focus on your main job
choices.resultText: You gave your employer full attention. Steady progress.

events.text: Office gossip spreads about layoffs. Colleagues whisper in the stairwell.

choices.label: Work harder to stand out
choices.resultText: You doubled your output. Hopefully it is enough.

choices.label: Join the gossip circle
choices.resultText: You learned rumours, not facts. Productivity dipped.

events.text: A coworker volunteers for the same promotion track and starts copying your ideas in meetings.

choices.label: Document your work and speak up
choices.resultText: Your manager noticed who delivered first. The rivalry sharpened.

choices.label: Confront them in the break room
choices.resultText: Voices rose. HR asked you both to cool off.

events.text: Your boss emails late Friday demanding a finished report by Monday — unpaid weekend hours implied.

choices.label: Grind through the weekend
choices.resultText: The report landed on their desk at dawn. Exhaustion followed.

choices.label: Push back politely
choices.resultText: You delivered Monday noon. They frowned but accepted it.

events.text: Rumours swirl that a larger firm wants to buy your company. Desks empty early as people refresh job boards.

choices.label: Update your CV quietly
choices.resultText: You prepared for the worst while still showing up.

choices.label: Stay loyal and focus on work
choices.resultText: Leadership noticed who kept their head down.

events.text: In a team presentation your colleague claims credit for research you stayed late to finish.

choices.label: Correct the record in the meeting
choices.resultText: Awkward silence, then nods from the director.

choices.label: Let it slide this once
choices.resultText: They smiled at the applause. You simmered at your desk.

events.text: Coworkers trade cruel gossip about a quiet teammate in the break room. They look at you expecting a reaction.

choices.label: Change the subject
choices.resultText: You steered talk back to weekend plans. Tension eased.

choices.label: Join in with a joke
choices.resultText: Laughs rippled, but you felt smaller afterward.

events.text: A freelance client keeps changing the brief at midnight and refuses to pay the agreed rate.

choices.label: Finish the work anyway
choices.resultText: They paid late — less than promised.

choices.label: Walk away from the contract
choices.resultText: You protected your sanity but lost the gig.

events.text: Ride-share surge pricing kicks in during a rainy evening rush. Your phone buzzes nonstop.

choices.label: Drive through the surge
choices.resultText: You earned well but arrived home exhausted.

choices.label: Stay home tonight
choices.resultText: You watched the rain from your couch.

events.text: A freelance platform flags your account after a dispute and temporarily bans you from new jobs.

choices.label: Appeal the decision
choices.resultText: Support reinstated you after a week.

choices.label: Switch to a different platform
choices.resultText: Starting over cost time and profile fees.

events.text: A happy tutoring client posts a glowing review online. New messages flood your inbox.

choices.label: Take on more students
choices.resultText: Word of mouth filled your evenings.

choices.label: Keep your current load
choices.resultText: Steady work without burning out.

events.text: A repeat freelance client asks whether you would run their operations full-time as a small business.

choices.label: Accept the offer
choices.resultText: Your side hustle may become your main career.

choices.label: Decline and stay independent
choices.resultText: Freedom won over stability — for now.

events.text: Tax authorities send a notice about undeclared side income from your gig work.

choices.label: Pay the back taxes
choices.resultText: Painful, but you are square with the law.

choices.label: Hire an accountant to negotiate
choices.resultText: The bill shrank after a tense meeting.
